messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
BL-520 — Rewrap the 19 grandfathered wrapped-step feature files and drain the BL-515 legacy allowlist
What it solves: WHAT / WHY: BL-515's lint gate (swarmforge/scripts/gherkin_lint_gate.sh + gherkin_lint_gate_lib.bb)
rejects a Gherkin step whose text wraps onto a bare continuation line, because the vendored APS
parser SILENTLY DROPS that continuation line (and any <param> on it) while still exiting 0. To
avoid re…
Approval context: Swarm-surfaced follow-up to BL-515 (coder note, 2026-07-18): drain the 19-file grandfather allowlist that BL-515 introduced so the single-line-step lint gate has zero standing exemptions. Sign-off is on: (a) rewrapping all 19 listed feature files to single-line steps and removing each allowlist ent…
BL-520 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-520" (or "reject BL-520 <reason>") to act.
